course_name: Draping on Dress Form — Couture Techniques
sector: Apparel Design, Pattern Making & Fashion Technology

modules.module_title: Introduction to Draping & Dress Form Essentials

questions.question: Dress form par draping shuru karne se pehle, kaun sa step sabse pehle kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Dress form ko body tape se mark karna
options.C: Fabric ko press karna

questions.explanation: Draping se pehle dress form par bust, waist, hip, neck jaise key body lines ko mark karna zaroori hai, taaki fabric ko sahi reference points mil sakein.

questions.question: Draping ke liye use hone wala basic fabric kaun sa hai, jise 'practice fabric' bhi kehte hain?

options.B: Muslin
options.C: Velvet

questions.explanation: Muslin ek standard aur affordable fabric hai jo draping practice aur pattern development ke liye use hota hai, kyuki iski stability achhi hoti hai.

questions.question: Dress form par center front (CF) aur center back (CB) ko mark karne ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.A: Fabric ko sidha cut karne ke liye
options.B: Garment ki symmetry maintain karne ke liye
options.C: Side seams locate karne ke liye
options.D: Shoulder seams locate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: CF aur CB lines garment ki symmetry aur balance ko maintain karne mein madad karti hain, ensuring ki garment body par evenly drape ho.

questions.question: Draping ke dauraan fabric ko dress form par secure karne ke liye kaun se tools sabse zyada use hote hain?

options.B: Fabric scissors
options.C: Pins (Dressmaker's pins)

questions.explanation: Pins fabric ko dress form par temporarily hold aur shape karne ke liye sabse essential tool hain.

questions.question: Straight grain (seedha dhaaga) ko dress form par kis position mein align kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Vertically, parallel to the CF/CB line
options.C: Diagonally, at a 45-degree angle

questions.explanation: Straight grain garment ko stability deta hai aur vertically align hone par gravity ke saath seedha hang karta hai, jo ki most garments ke liye desired hai.

questions.question: Draping mein 'cross grain' (bhaari dhaaga) ka kya role hai aur yeh kaise align hota hai?

options.A: Yeh fabric ko stretch deta hai aur vertically align hota hai.
options.B: Yeh fabric ko stability deta hai aur horizontally across the body align hota hai.
options.C: Yeh fabric ko drape deta hai aur diagonally align hota hai.
options.D: Yeh fabric ko support deta hai aur shoulder line par align hota hai.

questions.explanation: Cross grain straight grain ke perpendicular hota hai aur horizontally align hota hai. Yeh fabric ko kuch stability deta hai aur aksar horizontal elements jaise yokes ya bands mein use hota hai.

questions.question: Dress form par bust point (BP) ko mark karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Shoulder seam ki length decide karne ke liye
options.B: Dart placement aur shaping ke liye
options.C: Hemline ki position set karne ke liye
options.D: Waistline ki circumference measure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Bust point darts ko place aur manipulate karne ke liye ek reference point hai, jo bust area mein proper shaping achieve karne mein madad karta hai.

questions.question: Draping ke liye fabric ko cutting se pehle 'grainline' check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Taki fabric ka color match ho sake
options.B: Taki fabric shrink na ho
options.C: Taki garment ki proper drape aur fall mile
options.D: Taki fabric ko easily fold kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Correct grainline alignment yeh ensure karta hai ki garment body par sahi tareeke se drape ho aur uska intended fall achieve ho.

questions.question: 'Bias grain' par drape karne ka primary benefit kya hai, especially couture techniques mein?

options.A: Yeh fabric ko bahut stiff banata hai.
options.B: Yeh fabric ko maximum stretch aur fluid drape deta hai.
options.C: Yeh fabric ko crease-resistant banata hai.
options.D: Yeh fabric ko cutting mein asaan banata hai.

questions.explanation: Bias grain fabric ko uski maximum elasticity deta hai, jisse woh body ke contours par beautifully drape hota hai aur ek fluid, flowing fall deta hai, jo couture designs mein bahut value kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Draping karte waqt fabric ko smooth aur wrinkle-free rakhne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Fabric ko bahut tight pull karna
options.B: Fabric ko loose chhod dena
options.C: Pins ko evenly distribute karna aur excess fabric ko clip/slash karna

questions.explanation: Fabric ko evenly pin karna aur tension points par clips ya slashes lagane se fabric smooth rehta hai aur wrinkles avoid hote hain.

questions.question: Dress form par shoulder seam (kandha ki silai) ko mark karne ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Shoulder ke highest point par
options.C: Shoulder aur neck ke beech mein, shoulder slope ke saath align karke

questions.explanation: Shoulder seam natural shoulder slope ko follow karti hai, typically neck aur armscye ke beech mein. Isse garment ka fit aur hang sahi rehta hai.

questions.question: Draping mein 'trueing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Muslin ko dress form par pin karna
options.B: Fabric ko cut karna
options.C: Pattern lines ko smooth aur accurate banana

questions.explanation: Trueing draped lines ko correct aur refine karne ka process hai, taaki pattern pieces accurate aur smooth ho aur ek saath sahi se fit hon.

questions.question: Why is a good quality 'tape measure' essential in draping?

options.B: To mark seam allowances
options.C: To take precise body measurements and transfer them to the drape

questions.explanation: Accurate body measurements लेना और उन्हें drape पर transfer करना एक well-fitting garment बनाने के लिए बहुत ज़रूरी है, और इसके लिए एक अच्छा tape measure आवश्यक है।

questions.question: Draping mein 'balance' maintain karna kyun critical hai?

options.B: Taki garment symmetrical aur gravity ke saath sahi se hang kare
options.C: Taki fabric stretch na ho

questions.explanation: Proper balance ensure karta hai ki garment body par evenly hang kare, pull ya distort na ho, aur uska intended design aur silhouette sahi dikhe.

questions.question: What is the purpose of 'notches' in a draped pattern?

options.B: To indicate seam allowances
options.C: To align pattern pieces correctly during assembly

questions.explanation: Notches pattern pieces ko sew karte waqt matching points provide karte hain, jisse accurate assembly ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Draping mein 'excess fullness' ko manage karne ka ek common tareeka kya hai jab fabric ko body contours par shape kar rahe ho?

options.B: Fabric ko cut kar dena
options.C: Darts, gathers, ya pleats mein manipulate karna

questions.explanation: Darts, gathers, aur pleats fabric ki excess fullness ko control aur redistribute karne ke fundamental methods hain, jisse garment body ke shape ke according fit hota hai.

questions.question: Dress form ka size choose karte waqt sabse important factor kya hai?

options.B: Uska material
options.C: Client ke body measurements se match karna

questions.explanation: Dress form ko client ke key body measurements (bust, waist, hip) se match karna sabse zaroori hai, taaki draped garment ka fit accurate ho.

questions.question: Basic bodice block drape karte samay, sabse pehle kis body area par fabric ko pin kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Shoulder
options.C: Center Front (CF) line

questions.explanation: Center Front line ko sabse pehle pin karna ek stable vertical anchor provide karta hai, jisse baaki drape ko balance karna asaan hota hai.

questions.question: Bodice front mein 'bust dart' ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Bust area mein fabric ko shape dena
options.C: Waistline ko tighten karna

questions.explanation: Bust darts excess fabric ko remove karte hain aur bust curve ko accommodate karne ke liye fabric ko three-dimensional shape dete hain.

questions.question: Basic straight skirt drape karte waqt, fabric ko dress form par kaise align kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Vertically along the CF/CB and side seams
options.C: Diagonally at the waist

questions.explanation: Straight skirt ke liye, fabric ki straight grain ko CF/CB aur side seams ke parallel vertically align karna zaroori hai, taaki skirt seedha aur evenly hang kare.

questions.question: Skirt draping mein 'hip curve' ko smoothly accommodate karne ke liye kya technique use karte hain?

options.B: Hip area mein darts dena
options.C: Side seams ko stretch karna

questions.explanation: Darts hip area mein excess fabric ko remove karte hain aur skirt ko body ke natural curves ke around shape dete hain.

questions.question: 'Pivot method' ka use karke dart ko relocate karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Yeh fabric waste ko kam karta hai.
options.B: Yeh original dart amount ko maintain karte hue, dart ko naye location par move karta hai.
options.C: Yeh garment ko zyada stretchable banata hai.
options.D: Yeh cutting process ko asaan banata hai.

questions.explanation: Pivot method ek pattern manipulation technique hai jo dart ki fullness ko maintain karte hue, use bust point se kisi aur location par move karne mein help karta hai, jisse design flexibility milti hai.

questions.question: Bodice back drape karte samay, kaun si line sabse pehle establish ki jaati hai?

options.B: Side seam
options.C: Center Back (CB) line

questions.explanation: Bodice front ki tarah, back mein bhi Center Back line ko pehle establish karna drape ke liye ek stable foundation provide karta hai.

questions.question: 'Princess seam' bodice mein darts ko kaise incorporate kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Darts ko neckline par rakha jaata hai.
options.B: Darts ko side seam par rakha jaata hai.
options.C: Darts ko seam lines mein absorb kar liya jaata hai jo bust contour ko follow karti hain.
options.D: Darts ko back par rakha jaata hai.

questions.explanation: Princess seams actual darts ko replace karti hain. Yeh curved seams hoti hain jo bust aur waist ke upar se guzarti hain, fabric ko shape deti hain aur ek clean, continuous line banati hain.

questions.question: 'Contouring' draping technique ka main aim kya hai?

options.B: Garment ko body ke curves ke bilkul close fit karna, jisme negative ease bhi ho sakti hai
options.C: Garment ko stiff banana
options.D: Garment mein extra volume add karna

questions.explanation: Contouring ka matlab hai fabric ko body ke exact curves aur hollows par sculpt karna, jisse ek extremely close aur body-hugging fit milta hai, often negative ease ke saath for a second-skin effect.

questions.question: What is 'ease' in draping?

options.A: The amount of fabric added for decoration
options.B: The difference between body measurement and garment measurement, allowing for movement and comfort
options.C: The amount of stretch in the fabric

questions.explanation: Ease woh additional measurement hai jo garment mein body measurement ke upar add kiya jaata hai taaki pehnne wale ko movement aur comfort mil sake.

questions.question: Skirt ke 'waistline' par fabric ko drape karte waqt, kis area mein sabse zyada fullness manage karni padti hai?

options.B: Side seams
options.C: Center front/back
options.D: Waistline, especially for darts or gathers

questions.explanation: Waistline par body ka circumference sabse kam hota hai, isliye yahan par excess fabric ko darts, gathers ya pleats ke through manage karna padta hai taaki skirt body par fit ho sake.

questions.question: Basic bodice block drape karne ke baad, armhole aur neckline ko shape dene ke liye kaun sa tool use karte hain?

options.B: French curve ya varied curves
options.C: Tailor's chalk

questions.explanation: French curve ya any curved ruler smooth aur aesthetically pleasing armhole aur neckline shapes create karne ke liye ideal hote hain.

questions.question: Jab fabric ko 'bias' par drape karte hain, toh uski drape aur fall mein kya difference aata hai as compared to straight grain?

options.B: More rigid aur less fluid
options.C: Softer, more fluid aur body-hugging

questions.explanation: Bias cut fabric mein zyada stretch aur flexibility hoti hai, jisse woh body par beautifully drape hota hai aur ek soft, fluid, body-hugging fall deta hai.

questions.question: Draping mein 'slash and spread' method ka use kya hai?

options.A: Fabric ko sidha cut karne ke liye
options.B: Darts ko relocate karne aur fullness add karne ke liye
options.C: Seam allowances ko mark karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko press karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Slash and spread ek pattern manipulation technique hai jisme pattern ko cut karke spread kiya jaata hai taaki extra fullness, flare, ya naye dart locations create kiye ja sakein.

questions.question: Basic bodice drape karte waqt, 'waistline' ko generally kis level par mark kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Natural waist level par
options.C: Hip level par

questions.explanation: Natural waistline ek standard reference point hai jahan par most garments ki waistline position ki jaati hai.

questions.question: 'Side seam' ko drape karte samay, kya ensure karna sabse important hai?

options.B: Ki woh front aur back panel ko smoothly join kare aur body contour ko follow kare
options.C: Ki woh shoulder seam se match kare
options.D: Ki woh hemline se parallel ho

questions.explanation: Ek well-draped side seam front aur back panels ko seamlessly blend karti hai, body ke natural curves ko follow karti hai, aur garment ko balanced dikhati hai.

questions.question: Muslin drape karne ke baad, pattern ko paper par transfer karne se pehle kaun sa step zaroori hai?

options.B: Muslin par marking ko darken karna aur grainlines check karna
options.C: Muslin ko fold karna

questions.explanation: Paper pattern par accurate transfer ke liye, muslin par ki gayi sabhi markings (jaise seam lines, darts, grainlines) ko clearly visible aur correct hona chahiye.

questions.question: Skirt block drape karte waqt, 'hemline' ko kaise determine kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Waistline se ek fixed distance par
options.B: Dress form par perpendicular to the CF/CB, evenly from the floor
options.C: Side seam se measure karke

questions.explanation: Ek balanced aur even hemline floor se ek consistent distance par hoti hai, jo CF/CB ke perpendicular hoti hai.

questions.question: 'Stand collar' drape karte waqt, neck circumference par fabric ko kaise shape kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Straightly
options.C: Neckline ke curve ke saath stand karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Stand collar ko is tarah drape kiya jaata hai ki woh neck ke around seedha khada rahe, jiske liye neckline ke curve ke saath shaping zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Roll collar' ki characteristic feature kya hai?

options.A: Yeh neckline par flat rehta hai.
options.B: Yeh neck ke around fold hokar ek soft roll create karta hai.
options.C: Yeh high stand collar hota hai.
options.D: Yeh armhole se extend hota hai.

questions.explanation: Roll collar ko is tarah drape kiya jaata hai ki woh neckline se upar uthkar aur phir neeche ki taraf fold hokar ek soft, continuous roll banaye.

questions.question: 'Cowl neck' drape karne ke liye kaun si grainline sabse effective hai aur kyun?

options.A: Straight grain, kyuki yeh stability deta hai.
options.B: Cross grain, kyuki yeh horizontal stretch deta hai.
options.C: Bias grain, kyuki yeh fluid drape aur soft folds create karta hai.
options.D: True bias, kyuki yeh stiff support deta hai.

questions.explanation: Bias grain mein maximum stretch aur fluidity hoti hai, jo cowl neck ke signature soft, flowing folds aur graceful drape ko achieve karne ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: 'Set-in sleeve' drape karte waqt, sleeve head ko armhole mein fit karne ke liye kya adjustment zaroori hai?

options.B: Sleeve head par ease distribute karna
options.C: Armhole ko enlarge karna

questions.explanation: Sleeve head mein proper ease ko evenly distribute karna zaroori hai, taaki sleeve armhole mein smoothly fit ho aur koi puckering na ho.

questions.question: 'Kimono sleeve' ka primary feature kya hai?

options.A: Yeh ek separate sleeve piece hota hai jo bodice se attach hota hai.
options.B: Yeh bodice ke saath integrated hota hai aur shoulder se extend hota hai.
options.C: Yeh bahut tight fit hota hai.
options.D: Yeh cuff par gathers ke saath hota hai.

questions.explanation: Kimono sleeve bodice ke saath hi cut kiya jaata hai, jisse shoulder aur sleeve ke beech ek seamless aur continuous line banti hai.

questions.question: 'Raglan sleeve' drape karne ka advantage kya hai, especially for sportswear?

options.A: Yeh zyada formal look deta hai.
options.B: Yeh shoulder aur armhole area mein greater range of motion deta hai.
options.C: Yeh fabric waste ko kam karta hai.
options.D: Yeh ek tight fit create karta hai.

questions.explanation: Raglan sleeves ki diagonal seam jo underarm se neckline tak jaati hai, shoulder aur armhole area mein zyada flexibility aur movement ki azaadi deti hai, jo sportswear ke liye ideal hai.

questions.question: 'Puff sleeve' mein volume create karne ke liye kaun si technique use karte hain?

options.B: Gathers ya pleats sleeve cap aur/ya cuff par
options.C: Straight seam

questions.explanation: Puff sleeves mein unki signature volumetric shape create karne ke liye sleeve cap aur/ya cuff par gathers ya pleats add kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: 'Yoke' draping ka main purpose kya hai?

options.B: Shoulder aur back area mein structure aur design detail provide karna
options.C: Garment ko stretchable banana
options.D: Garment mein extra length add karna

questions.explanation: Yokes garments ke upper body part mein structure, support, aur ek distinct design element add karte hain, often shirts aur jackets mein.

questions.question: 'Peter Pan collar' kis category mein aata hai?

options.B: Roll collar
options.C: Flat collar

questions.explanation: Peter Pan collar ek flat collar hai jo neckline par flat rehta hai aur iske edges rounded hote hain.

questions.question: 'Sleeve head' mein 'ease' ko distribute karte waqt, kis area mein sabse zyada ease rakhi jaati hai?

options.B: Sleeve hem
options.C: Top of the sleeve cap (shoulder point ke paas)

questions.explanation: Sleeve cap ke top par sabse zyada ease rakhi jaati hai taaki sleeve smoothly shoulder curve ke upar fit ho aur natural shape le.

questions.question: 'Draped collar' (jaise shawl collar) banate samay, kaun si technique use hoti hai jo lapel aur collar ko seamlessly blend karti hai?

options.B: Collar aur lapel ko ek hi piece mein drape karna, jisme roll line important hoti hai
options.C: Collar ko bias par cut karna

questions.explanation: Draped collars jaise shawl collar mein, collar aur lapel ko ek single piece mein drape kiya jaata hai, jisme roll line ka careful manipulation seamless transition aur natural roll create karta hai.

questions.question: 'Mandarin collar' ki kya pehchan hai?

options.B: Yeh ek short stand-up collar hota hai jo front par overlap nahi karta.
options.C: Yeh ek bada, flat collar hota hai.
options.D: Yeh ek roll collar hota hai.

questions.explanation: Mandarin collar ek short, upright collar hai jo neck ke around khada rehta hai aur front par overlap ya fold nahi hota.

questions.question: 'Dolman sleeve' drape karte waqt, iska key feature kya hai jo ise kimono sleeve se alag karta hai?

options.A: Ismein ek defined armhole seam hoti hai.
options.B: Ismein underarm par zyada depth aur fullness hoti hai, jo body se wide curve mein attach hoti hai.
options.C: Yeh ek tight fit sleeve hota hai.
options.D: Yeh sirf cuff par gathers ke saath hota hai.

questions.explanation: Dolman sleeve mein underarm par kaafi depth aur fullness hoti hai, jisse body aur sleeve ke beech ek wide, batwing-like curve banta hai, jabki kimono sleeve comparatively straighter hota hai.

questions.question: Draping mein 'neckline' ko smoothly shape karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Curved ruler
options.C: Measuring tape

questions.explanation: Curved rulers neckline jaise curved edges ko smooth aur accurate shape dene mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: 'Asymmetrical draping' ka couture mein kya use hai?

options.A: Sirf basic garments banane ke liye
options.B: Unique aur artistic designs create karne ke liye jo symmetrical nahi hote
options.C: Fabric waste ko minimize karne ke liye
options.D: Garment ko zyada durable banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Asymmetrical draping designers ko creative freedom deti hai, jisse woh unique aur visually interesting designs bana sakte hain jo traditional symmetry se hatkar hote hain.

questions.question: 'Dart equivalent' kya hota hai?

options.B: Design features (jaise gathers, pleats, princess seams) jo darts ki tarah fullness ko control karte hain
options.C: Dart ki length

questions.explanation: Dart equivalents design features hote hain jo darts ki tarah body ke contours par fabric ko shape karte hain, lekin ek alag aesthetic dete hain.

questions.question: Jab ek sleeveless bodice drape karte hain, toh armhole ko kaise finish kiya jaata hai taki woh clean aur smooth dikhe?

options.A: Raw edges ko aise hi chhod dena
options.B: Armhole ko bahut tight karna
options.C: Armhole curve ko smooth aur balanced drape karna, aur proper ease dena
options.D: Armhole par extra fabric add karna

questions.explanation: Sleeveless garment mein armhole ki shaping aur balance bahut important hai. Smooth curve aur appropriate ease ensure karta hai ki woh comfortable aur visually appealing ho.

questions.question: Evening gown drape karte samay, fabric selection mein kya consideration sabse important hai?

options.B: Fabric ka drape aur fall (jaise silk, chiffon, satin)
options.C: Fabric ki print

questions.explanation: Evening gowns mein fabric ka drape aur fall (jaise fluidity, sheen, body) bahut crucial hota hai, kyuki yeh gown ke overall silhouette aur movement ko define karta hai.

questions.question: 'Mermaid silhouette' gown drape karte waqt, hips aur thighs par fit ko kaise achieve kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Body-hugging fit ke liye extensive contouring aur shaping darts/seams use karke
options.C: Gathers add karke

questions.explanation: Mermaid silhouette apni body-hugging fit ke liye jaani jaati hai jo hips aur thighs se tightly conform karti hai, iske liye precise contouring aur shaping darts/seams ki zaroorat hoti hai.

questions.question: Bridal gown mein 'train' drape karte samay, iski length aur fullness ko kaise balance kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf fabric ko floor par chhod kar
options.B: Train ki length aur width ko carefully plan karke, aur draping ke dauraan floor se measure karke, additional panels ya gathers add karke
options.C: Train ko bahut tight drape karke
options.D: Train mein koi gathers na dekar

questions.explanation: Train draping ek complex process hai jismein design vision, gravity, aur movement ko dhyan mein rakhte hue fabric ki length, width, aur fullness ko carefully plan aur adjust karna padta hai.

questions.question: 'A-line skirt' drape karte waqt, iska shape kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Waist se hips tak fitted aur neeche ki taraf flare hota hua
options.C: Full aur gathered

questions.explanation: A-line skirt waist se hips tak fitted hoti hai aur phir neeche ki taraf gradually flare karti hai, jisse 'A' letter ka shape banta hai.

questions.question: 'Corsetry' draping mein, body ko shape aur support dene ke liye kya essential hai?

options.B: Boning aur proper seam placement ke saath firm fit achieve karna
options.C: Soft, flowing fabrics use karna

questions.explanation: Corsetry ka main aim body ko shape aur support dena hai, jiske liye boning, firm interlining, aur precise seam placement ke saath ek structured aur firm fit zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Trumpet silhouette' gown aur 'Mermaid silhouette' gown mein primary difference kya hai draping ke perspective se?

options.A: Trumpet silhouette hips se thoda upar flare karna shuru karta hai, jabki Mermaid knee ya uske neeche se flare karti hai.
options.B: Mermaid silhouette zyada loose hota hai.
options.C: Trumpet silhouette mein koi flare nahi hota.

questions.explanation: Trumpet silhouette mein flare hips ke beech ya thoda upar se shuru hota hai, jabki mermaid silhouette mein flare ghutne ke paas ya uske neeche se shuru hota hai, jisse ek more dramatic flare milta hai.

questions.question: 'Strapless bodice' drape karte waqt, kya ensure karna sabse important hai?

options.B: Ki woh body par securely fit ho aur support provide kare
options.C: Ki usmein sleeves hon
options.D: Ki usmein bahut zyada gathers hon

questions.explanation: Strapless bodice ko bina straps ke body par tikane ke liye, uska fit bahut secure aur supportive hona chahiye, jiske liye proper internal structure aur contouring zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Full circle skirt' drape karne ke liye kitne fabric ki zaroorat padti hai as compared to an A-line skirt?

options.B: Zyada fabric, kyuki ismein zyada fullness hoti hai
options.C: Same amount of fabric

questions.explanation: Full circle skirt mein ek complete circle ka shape hota hai, jiske liye A-line skirt ki tulna mein kaafi zyada fabric ki zaroorat padti hai, taaki uski signature flowing fullness achieve ho sake.

questions.question: Bridal gown mein 'illusion neckline' drape karne ka purpose kya hai?

options.B: Sheer fabric (jaise net ya lace) se ek delicate, translucent effect create karna
options.C: Neckline ko stiff banana
options.D: Neckline ko bahut low cut karna

questions.explanation: Illusion neckline sheer fabric ka use karke ek delicate, transparent layer banati hai jo body par ek 'illusion' create karti hai, often ek low-cut ya strapless neckline ko modest touch dene ke liye.

questions.question: 'Pleats' ko evening gown mein drape karte waqt, kaun si baat par dhyan dena chahiye?

options.B: Pleats ki direction, depth, aur spacing ko carefully plan karna taki desired aesthetic aur movement mile
options.C: Pleats ko sirf side seams par rakhna
options.D: Pleats ko bahut loose chhod dena

questions.explanation: Evening gowns mein pleats design ka ek important element hote hain. Unki direction, depth, aur spacing ko carefully plan karne se desired silhouette, texture, aur movement milta hai.

questions.question: 'Godets' ka use gown draping mein kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Garment ko chhota karne ke liye
options.B: Hemline mein extra fullness aur flare add karne ke liye, especially in mermaid ya trumpet skirts
options.C: Waistline ko tighten karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Godets triangular fabric inserts hote hain jo skirt ke seams mein add kiye jaate hain, taaki hemline mein additional fullness, flare, aur movement create kiya ja sake, especially structured silhouettes mein.

questions.question: 'Sweetheart neckline' drape karte waqt, iska shape kaisa hota hai?

options.B: Heart-shaped curve, bust ke upar
options.C: V-shaped

questions.explanation: Sweetheart neckline bust ke upar ek distinct heart-shaped curve banati hai, jo use romantic aur feminine look deta hai.

questions.question: 'Gathered waistline' gown drape karte samay, gathers ko evenly distribute karna kyun important hai?

options.B: Taki garment balanced dikhe aur fit comfortable ho
options.C: Taki fabric waste kam ho

questions.explanation: Gathers ko evenly distribute karne se garment balanced dikhta hai, bulge ya unevenness avoid hoti hai, aur fit comfortable rehta hai.

questions.question: 'Draped back' details (jaise cowl back) create karne ke liye kaun si grainline prefer ki jaati hai?

options.B: Cross grain
options.C: Bias grain

questions.explanation: Bias grain ki fluidity aur stretchability cowl back jaise draped details ke liye ideal hai, jahan soft, flowing folds desired hote hain.

questions.question: Couture gowns mein 'built-in bra' ya 'corset' ko drape karte waqt, dress form par kya additional marks lagana zaroori hai?

options.B: Bust apex, underbust, aur side bust support lines
options.C: Shoulder line

questions.explanation: Built-in support structures ke liye bust apex, underbust, aur side bust lines ko mark karna zaroori hai, taaki garment body ko sahi tareeke se support aur shape de sake.

questions.question: 'One-shoulder' gown drape karte samay, bodice ki symmetry kaise manage karte hain?

options.A: Front aur back ko identical drape karke
options.B: Ek shoulder par strap ya sleeve aur dusre par asymmetry create karke, balance ka dhyan rakhte hue
options.C: Dono shoulders par straps laga kar

questions.explanation: One-shoulder designs inherently asymmetrical hote hain, isliye overall balance ko maintain karte hue, ek shoulder par detail aur dusre par clean finish ke saath drape karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Draped ruching' ka couture gown mein kya effect hota hai?

options.A: Yeh fabric ko flat aur smooth banata hai.
options.B: Yeh fabric mein texture, volume aur visual interest add karta hai, body ke contours ko accentuate karte hue.
options.C: Yeh garment ko loose fit deta hai.
options.D: Yeh fabric ko stretch karta hai.

questions.explanation: Ruching fabric ko gather karke soft folds aur texture create karta hai, jo body ke contours ko highlight karta hai aur gown mein visual depth aur sophistication add karta hai.

questions.question: Couture draping mein 'gathers' ka kya function hai?

options.A: Fabric ko flat banane ke liye
options.B: Fabric mein soft fullness aur volume create karne ke liye
options.C: Fabric ko stretch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Gathers fabric ki extra fullness ko control karke soft, rounded volume aur texture create karte hain, jo couture designs mein commonly use hote hain.

questions.question: 'Pleats' aur 'gathers' mein fundamental difference kya hai draping ke dauraan?

options.A: Pleats random hote hain, gathers structured hote hain.
options.B: Pleats structured folds hote hain jinhe press kiya ja sakta hai, gathers soft, unpressed fullness hote hain.
options.C: Gathers zyada fabric use karte hain.

questions.explanation: Pleats sharp, defined folds hote hain jinhe press karke shape di jaati hai, jabki gathers soft, uneven folds hote hain jo fabric ki fullness ko control karte hain bina sharp lines ke.

questions.question: 'True bias' par drape karte waqt, fabric ki stretchability ko kaise control karte hain taki garment overstretch na ho?

options.A: Fabric ko bahut tight pin karke
options.B: Fabric ko gently handle karke, minimal tension apply karke, aur garment ko hang karne ke liye time dekar
options.C: Fabric ko steam karke

questions.explanation: True bias par cut kiya gaya fabric bahut stretchable hota hai. Isliye, use gently handle karna, minimal tension apply karna, aur use relax hone ke liye hang karne dena overstretching ko rokne aur sahi drape achieve karne ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: 'Tucks' kya hote hain?

options.B: Fabric ke folds jo ek direction mein stitched hote hain, design aur shaping ke liye
options.C: Fabric ke random cuts

questions.explanation: Tucks fabric ke stitched folds hote hain jo decorative lines, texture, ya garment ko shaping dene ke liye use hote hain.

questions.question: 'Shirring' draping technique ka main effect kya hai?

options.B: Fabric mein multiple rows of gathers create karna, elasticity ke saath
options.C: Fabric ko flat karna

questions.explanation: Shirring mein fabric par multiple rows of stitching (aksar elastic thread ke saath) ki jaati hai, jisse fabric gather hota hai aur ek elasticated, textured effect milta hai.

questions.question: 'Flounces' aur 'Ruffles' mein draping perspective se kya antar hai?

options.A: Flounces fabric ke circular cuts hote hain jo natural curl dete hain, jabki Ruffles gathered ya pleated strips hote hain.
options.B: Dono same hain.
options.C: Ruffles zyada structured hote hain.

questions.explanation: Flounces fabric ke circular ya spiral cuts hote hain jo ek natural, flowing wave ya curl create karte hain. Ruffles straight fabric strips hote hain jinhe gather ya pleat karke fullness di jaati hai.

questions.question: 'Draped knot' ya 'twist' detail create karne ke liye kya zaroori hai?

options.B: Fabric mein adequate length aur drapeability hona
options.C: Fabric ko cut karna

questions.explanation: Draped knots aur twists ke liye fabric mein sufficient length aur achhi drapeability honi chahiye, taaki woh smoothly manipulate ho sake aur graceful folds banaye.

questions.question: 'Asymmetrical volume' drape karte waqt, garment ke overall balance ko kaise maintain karte hain?

options.A: Sirf ek side par volume add karke
options.B: Volume ko ek side par concentrate karte hue, dusri side par counter-balancing design elements ya simplicity rakh kar
options.C: Dono sides par identical volume add karke

questions.explanation: Asymmetrical designs mein balance achieve karne ke liye, ek side par volume concentrate karte waqt, dusri side par visual interest ya simplicity ke through balance create karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Cascading drape' create karne ke liye kaun si grainline sabse achhi hai?

options.B: Cross grain
options.C: Bias grain

questions.explanation: Bias grain ki fluidity aur soft fall cascading drapes ke liye best hai, jahan fabric smoothly aur gracefully neeche ki taraf flow karta hai.

questions.question: 'Interfacing' ka use couture draping mein kab kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Fabric ko stretch karne ke liye
options.B: Fabric ko support, structure aur crispness dene ke liye, especially collars, cuffs, aur waistbands mein
options.C: Fabric ko color karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko loose banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Interfacing ek underlying fabric layer hai jo garment ke specific areas ko support, structure, shape, aur crispness dene ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: 'Moulage' draping technique ka main objective kya hai?

options.B: Body ke exact contours ka 'second skin' pattern create karna, bina kisi ease ke
options.C: Decorative elements add karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko stretch karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Moulage ek highly precise draping technique hai jismein body ke exact contours ko capture kiya jaata hai, bina kisi ease ke, taaki ek perfect-fitting base pattern ban sake.

questions.question: 'Draped cowl' sleeve banane ke liye kya technique use hoti hai?

options.B: Sleeve cap par extra fabric drape karna aur gathers ya folds create karna
options.C: Sleeve ko straight cut karna

questions.explanation: Draped cowl sleeve mein sleeve cap par extra fabric ko gather ya fold karke soft, flowing drape aur volume create kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Cut-on-the-bias' garments ki draping mein kya challenge aata hai?

options.B: Fabric ka unpredictable stretch aur distortion, jise manage karna mushkil hota hai.
options.C: Fabric color fade ho jaata hai.
options.D: Fabric bahut stiff ho jaata hai.

questions.explanation: Bias cut fabric ki inherent stretchability aur fluidity use beautiful drape deti hai, lekin iska unpredictable stretch aur distortion draping ke dauraan ek significant challenge ho sakta hai.

questions.question: 'Fabric manipulation' techniques (jaise smocking, quilting, or pintucks) ko draping mein kaise integrate karte hain?

options.A: Draping ke baad, in techniques ko pattern pieces par apply karte hain.
options.B: Draping se pehle fabric ko manipulate karte hain aur phir use drape karte hain.
options.C: Fabric manipulation draping se unrelated hai.

questions.explanation: Couture mein, aksar fabric ko draping se pehle manipulate kiya jaata hai (jaise smocking, pleating, quilting), jisse manipulated fabric ki inherent structure aur texture draping process ko guide karti hai aur unique forms create karti hai.

questions.question: 'Volume' create karne ka sabse simple tareeka kya hai draping mein?

options.B: Fabric ko gather karna
options.C: Fabric ko stretch karna

questions.explanation: Gathers fabric ki excess fullness ko ek chhote area mein condense karke sabse asaan tareeke se volume create karte hain.

questions.question: 'Draped pleat' aur 'crisp pleat' mein kya antar hai?

options.A: Draped pleats soft aur flowing hote hain, jabki crisp pleats sharp aur well-defined hote hain.
options.B: Draped pleats stitched hote hain, crisp pleats nahi.
options.C: Crisp pleats sirf bias par hote hain.
options.D: Draped pleats bahut chhote hote hain.

questions.explanation: Draped pleats soft aur organic folds hote hain jo gravity ke saath flow karte hain, jabki crisp pleats sharp, pressed folds hote hain jo ek defined structure maintain karte hain.

questions.question: Draped muslin ko paper pattern par transfer karte waqt, kaun se markings sabse pehle transfer kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Grainlines, CF/CB, waistline, and bust/hip points
options.C: Seam allowances

questions.explanation: Grainlines aur key body lines (CF/CB, waistline, bust/hip points) pattern ke foundational reference points hain, jinhe sabse pehle transfer kiya jaata hai taaki pattern ki accuracy maintain ho.

questions.question: 'Trueing' process ka primary goal kya hai paper pattern par?

options.B: Draped lines ko smooth, accurate aur seam-ready banana
options.C: Pattern ko fold karna

questions.explanation: Trueing ka matlab hai draped lines ko correct aur smooth karna, unhe accurate curve ya straight lines mein refine karna, taaki sabhi pattern pieces seamlessly ek saath fit ho sakein.

questions.question: Seam allowances ko paper pattern par kab add kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Muslin ko cut karte waqt
options.C: Trueing aur final pattern lines establish karne ke baad

questions.explanation: Seam allowances ko hamesha final, trued pattern lines par add kiya jaata hai, taaki cutting aur stitching ke liye extra fabric mil sake.

questions.question: 'Balance marks' ya 'notches' pattern par kyun important hain?

options.B: Fabric ki type indicate karne ke liye
options.C: Garment assembly ke dauraan matching points aur proper alignment ensure karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Notches pattern pieces ko sew karte waqt reference points provide karte hain, jisse seams accurately match hoti hain aur garment ki proper assembly ensure hoti hai.

questions.question: Draped pattern mein 'grainline' ko accurately transfer karna kyun critical hai?

options.B: Taki garment ka drape, fall aur stability maintain ho
options.C: Taki pattern ko fold kiya ja sake
options.D: Taki pattern ko store kiya ja sake

questions.explanation: Grainline garment ke drape, fall, aur overall stability ko directly affect karti hai. Incorrect grainline transfer se garment unevenly hang ho sakta hai ya distort ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Draping se bane pattern ko 'block' ya 'sloper' kab kehte hain?

options.A: Jab usmein seam allowances add kiye jaate hain
options.B: Jab woh basic, well-fitting pattern hota hai jise future designs ke liye base ke roop mein use kiya jaata hai
options.C: Jab woh bahut complex hota hai
options.D: Jab woh color kiya jaata hai

questions.explanation: Block ya sloper ek basic, custom-fitted pattern hota hai jismein koi design detail nahi hoti. Ise naye designs create karne ke liye ek foundation ke roop mein use kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Pattern grading' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek size ke pattern ko different sizes mein systematically scale karna
options.C: Pattern ko store karna

questions.explanation: Pattern grading ek process hai jismein ek existing pattern ko proportion aur fit maintain karte hue bade ya chhote sizes mein scale kiya jaata hai, jo mass production ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Draped garment mein 'fit adjustment' karte waqt, agar dress form client se thodi alag hai, toh kya approach lenge?

options.A: Sirf dress form par jo dikh raha hai wahi follow karenge.
options.B: Client ke specific measurements ko dhyan mein rakhte hue dress form par padding ya adjustments karenge, aur final fitting client par confirm karenge.
options.C: Garment ko loose bana denge.
options.D: Client ko dress form ke according adjust hone ko kahenge.

questions.explanation: Couture draping mein client-specific fit ke liye, dress form ko client ke measurements ke according pad karna aur final adjustments real client par confirm karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: 'Walk the pattern' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pattern pieces ko ek saath align karke check karna ki seams smoothly match ho rahe hain
options.C: Pattern ko design karna

questions.explanation: Walk the pattern ek technique hai jismein pattern pieces ko seam by seam align karke check kiya jaata hai ki woh smoothly match ho rahe hain aur koi discrepancy nahi hai, stitching se pehle.

questions.question: Draping se bane pattern mein 'dart manipulation' ka use kyun hota hai?

options.A: Sirf darts ko remove karne ke liye
options.B: Darts ko relocate karne, combine karne, ya unhe design lines (jaise princess seams) mein convert karne ke liye
options.C: Pattern ko chhota karne ke liye
options.D: Fabric ko stiff banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Dart manipulation ek versatile technique hai jisse darts ko design variations create karne ke liye move, combine, ya transform kiya jaata hai, jaise ki princess seams, gathers, ya pleats.

questions.question: 'Muslin fitting' ke dauraan, agar garment mein 'drag lines' dikhe, toh iska kya matlab ho sakta hai aur aap kya karenge?

options.A: Yeh ek design feature hai, kuch nahi karna.
options.B: Drag lines indicate karte hain ki fabric kahi se pull ho raha hai ya tension mein hai, isliye pattern par necessary adjustments karenge (jaise ease add karna ya seam ko release karna).
options.C: Fabric ko stretch kar denge.

questions.explanation: Drag lines fit issues ka ek clear indicator hain. Yeh batate hain ki garment kahi se tight hai ya fabric par uneven tension hai, jise pattern par ease add karke ya seam ko adjust karke theek karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Draped pattern ke final paper version ko 'master pattern' kyun kehte hain?

options.A: Kyunki yeh sabse bada pattern hota hai.
options.B: Kyunki yeh original aur most accurate pattern hota hai jisse production patterns banaye jaate hain.
options.C: Kyunki ismein koi seam allowance nahi hoti.
options.D: Kyunki yeh sirf ek baar use hota hai.

questions.explanation: Master pattern draped muslin se directly derived kiya gaya original, fully trued, aur accurate pattern hota hai, jo subsequent design variations aur production patterns ke liye base ka kaam karta hai.

questions.question: 'Slashing and spreading' technique ka use pattern transfer ke baad kab kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Sirf dart create karne ke liye
options.B: Draped pattern mein design variations (jaise added fullness, flare, ya new dart placements) introduce karne ke liye
options.C: Pattern ko straight karne ke liye
options.D: Pattern ko fold karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Slashing and spreading ek pattern manipulation method hai jo draped pattern mein new design elements jaise ki additional volume, flare, ya darts ko relocate karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Draped pattern par 'perforations' ya 'awl holes' ka kya use hai?

options.A: Pattern ko hang karne ke liye
options.B: Key points (jaise dart points, notches) ko fabric par transfer karne ke liye
options.C: Pattern ko decorate karne ke liye
options.D: Pattern ko cut karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Perforations ya awl holes pattern par key points ko mark karte hain, jinhe chalk ya tracing wheel se fabric par transfer kiya jaata hai, taaki accurate assembly ho sake.

questions.question: Draped pattern se 'lining pattern' banate waqt, kya adjustment zaroori ho sakti hai?

options.A: Lining ko garment pattern se chhota banana.
options.B: Lining ko thodi si ease dena, aur facing areas ko eliminate karna.
options.C: Lining ko bahut stiff banana.
options.D: Lining ko same fabric se cut karna.

questions.explanation: Lining pattern ko main garment pattern se thoda sa zyada ease di jaati hai taaki woh comfortable ho aur garment ki outer fabric ko pull na kare. Aksar facing areas ko lining mein absorb kar liya jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Design ease' aur 'wearing ease' mein kya antar hai aur draping mein dono ka kya importance hai?

options.B: Wearing ease movement aur comfort ke liye minimal required ease hai, jabki Design ease additional fullness hai jo aesthetic purpose ke liye add ki jaati hai. Draping mein dono ko balance karna hota hai.
options.C: Design ease sirf tight garments mein hoti hai.
options.D: Wearing ease sirf loose garments mein hoti hai.

questions.explanation: Wearing ease woh minimum ease hai jo body movement aur comfort ke liye zaroori hai. Design ease woh extra ease hai jo garment ko ek particular style ya silhouette dene ke liye add ki jaati hai. Draping mein in dono ko carefully balance karna padta hai taaki garment functional aur visually appealing dono ho.
